---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# ```{r echo=FALSE}
# library(reticulate)
# use_python("C:/Users/Startklar/Downloads/Anaconda/python.exe", required = TRUE)
# ```
# 
# ```{python}
# from ucimlrepo import fetch_ucirepo 
#   
# # fetch dataset 
# aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175 = fetch_ucirepo(id=890) 
#   
# # data (as pandas dataframes) 
# X = aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175.data.features 
# y = aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175.data.targets 
#   
# # metadata 
# print(aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175.metadata) 
#   
# # variable information 
# print(aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175.variables) 
# 
# ```



```{r}
# Load the package
library(ucimlrepo)

# Fetch the dataset by its UCI ID (890)
aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175 <- fetch_ucirepo(id = 890)

# View metadata
print(aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175$metadata)

# Access features and targets
features <- aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175$data$features
targets  <- aids_clinical_trials_group_study_175$data$targets

# Preview the first rows
head(features)
head(targets)
```
